name: shopify-admin
description: Shopify Admin GraphQL MCP tools for Claude Code.

shopify_store.description: Shopify store domain, for example my-store.myshopify.com

shopify_access_token.description: Shopify custom app Admin API access token, for example shpat_...

shopify_api_version.description: Shopify Admin API version, for example 2025-07
